touches.ai_summary: Lucas Wilson submitted an inbound form on our website expressing interest in CRM automation for RidgeConnect's sales team. Indicated they're evaluating solutions to streamline their current process.
next_steps: Rep to send introductory email with calendar link

touches.ai_summary: Rep sent introductory email to Lucas explaining our CRM automation capabilities and requesting time for a discovery call. Lucas responded positively, confirmed his team is actively looking for a solution.

questions_asked.question: Do you support integrations with healthcare compliance tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have pre-built connectors for major healthcare IT systems and can customize as needed.

next_steps: Lucas to share available times for discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Lucas shared his availability and mentioned he'd like to include their COO David Adams in later conversations. Indicated budget has been allocated for CRM improvements this quarter.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers are fully onboarded within 4-6 weeks depending on customization needs.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Rep confirmed discovery call scheduled for Tuesday. Sent pre-call questionnaire to Lucas to understand current CRM setup and pain points. Lucas completed it promptly.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for Tuesday 2pm

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Lucas covering RidgeConnect's current CRM challenges. They're using a legacy system with minimal automation. Lucas described manual data entry burden on their 10-person sales team and inconsistent follow-up processes. Expressed strong interest in automation features and consulting support.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform automate lead scoring based on healthcare-specific signals?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can configure custom scoring models based on your ideal customer profile and engagement patterns.

questions_asked.question: What level of consulting support is included in your packages?
questions_asked.answer: Our automations_plus_consulting tier includes dedicated onboarding, custom workflow design, and ongoing optimization support.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: We're losing deals due to slow follow-up and our COO has made CRM efficiency a Q2 priority.

next_steps: Rep to prepare demo showcasing automation workflows
Lucas to loop in David Adams for later stages

touches.ai_summary: Quick follow-up call to confirm demo agenda and Lucas's priority use cases. Lucas confirmed he wants to see automated email sequences and lead enrichment features in the demo.

questions_asked.question: Who else from your team should attend the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Just me for now, but I'll bring in David and our Account Manager Evelyn for technical eval if it looks good.

next_steps: Demo scheduled for Thursday

touches.ai_summary: Rep sent demo confirmation email with agenda and relevant case studies from healthcare IT companies. Lucas confirmed attendance and shared additional context about their reporting needs.
next_steps: Demo on Thursday at 10am

touches.ai_summary: Demo call with Lucas showcasing CRM automation workflows, lead scoring, and email sequences. Lucas was engaged and asked detailed questions about customization options. He was particularly impressed with the healthcare compliance integrations and reporting dashboards.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation triggers based on our specific sales stages?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, all workflows are fully customizable to match your process.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing scale with seat count?
questions_asked.answer: We'll discuss exact pricing after we confirm your requirements, but we offer volume discounts and flexible packaging.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a clear win for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Reducing manual data entry by at least 50% and improving our follow-up speed to close more deals.

next_steps: Lucas to arrange technical evaluation with his team
Rep to send pricing overview

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Lucas and Account Manager Evelyn Hassan. Walked through implementation process, data migration, and integration requirements. Evelyn raised questions about security and compliance certifications.

questions_asked.question: Do you have SOC 2 Type II certification?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we're SOC 2 Type II certified and HIPAA compliant.

questions_asked.question: What's involved in migrating our existing CRM data?
questions_asked.answer: Our consulting team handles the full migration with minimal downtime, typically completed in one weekend.

questions_asked.question: Are there any integration requirements we haven't covered?
questions_asked.answer: We need to connect with our existing healthcare billing system, but Evelyn will send those specs.

next_steps: Evelyn to send technical requirements doc
Schedule extended technical deep dive

touches.ai_summary: Extended technical evaluation covering API capabilities, data security, and custom workflow configuration. Lucas and Evelyn tested the platform hands-on. Evelyn confirmed technical requirements can be met. Discussion shifted to pricing and implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: Can we run a pilot with 3 seats before rolling out to the full team?
questions_asked.answer: We typically recommend full deployment for the 10-seat package to see complete workflow benefits, but we can discuss phased rollout.

questions_asked.question: What ongoing support is included after implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited email/chat support, quarterly business reviews, and access to our customer success team.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place by end of Q2, so within the next 6 weeks.

next_steps: Rep to prepare formal proposal
Lucas to schedule exec meeting with David Adams

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with COO David Adams and Lucas. David expressed support for the initiative and confirmed budget availability. Discussed ROI expectations and strategic fit with RidgeConnect's growth plans. David requested detailed pricing breakdown.

questions_asked.question: What ROI are your healthcare customers typically seeing?
questions_asked.answer: Most see 3-5x ROI in year one from increased win rates and sales productivity gains.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide customer references from similar-sized healthcare IT companies?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we'll include three relevant references in the proposal.

questions_asked.question: Beyond CRM automation, are there other areas we should address in the proposal?
questions_asked.answer: Focus on automation and consulting support. David wants to ensure we have hand-holding through implementation.

next_steps: Rep to send comprehensive proposal with ROI analysis
Lucas to coordinate internal stakeholder review

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Lucas. Walked through pricing for 10 seats with automations_plus_consulting package at $11,700 ACV. Lucas indicated this is above their initial budget target and requested room for negotiation.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the consulting hours included?
questions_asked.answer: We can adjust the consulting allocation, but it may impact implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: What budget range were you planning for?
questions_asked.answer: We were targeting around $9,000 for 10 seats. Can you work with us on pricing?

objections: Pricing is higher than anticipated budget
next_steps: Lucas to discuss internally with David and Evelyn
Rep to explore pricing flexibility

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up proposal discussion with Lucas. He emphasized that David is supportive but needs to see the investment justified. Lucas asked about payment terms and whether annual vs quarterly payment affects pricing. Also inquired about reducing scope to hit budget.

questions_asked.question: Would annual prepayment get us better pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, annual prepayment typically qualifies for a 10-15% discount.

questions_asked.question: What if we started with basic automation without the consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: That would reduce the cost, but given your implementation needs, we strongly recommend the consulting support.

objections: Need to stay within budget constraints
next_steps: Rep to prepare revised pricing options
Lucas to present to David

touches.ai_summary: Rep sent email with three pricing scenarios: full package at $11,700, discounted annual-prepay option at $10,200, and reduced consulting package at $9,500. Emphasized value of full consulting support for successful adoption.
next_steps: Lucas to review with David and Evelyn
Follow-up call scheduled for Monday

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Lucas. He confirmed David approved moving forward but needs to get closer to $9,000. Lucas expressed concern about implementation risk and wants to ensure consulting support isn't compromised. Discussed annual prepayment and multi-year commitment options.

questions_asked.question: If we commit to a two-year contract, what pricing can you offer?
questions_asked.answer: Multi-year agreements do open up additional discount opportunities. Let me work with my team on a two-year proposal.

questions_asked.question: Is $9,000 your absolute ceiling, or is there some flexibility?
questions_asked.answer: We could potentially stretch to $9,500 if the value is there, but David is watching costs closely this quarter.

next_steps: Rep to propose two-year pricing structure
Lucas to confirm decision timeline

touches.ai_summary: Brief pricing alignment call. Rep proposed $9,100 ACV with annual prepayment and full consulting package. Lucas indicated this is workable and will present to David for final approval.

questions_asked.question: Does $9,100 work within your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that should work. I'll confirm with David but this feels like a good landing spot.

next_steps: Lucas to get David's final approval
Rep to prepare contract

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call to confirm contract details. Lucas confirmed David approved the $9,100 pricing. Discussed contract terms, payment schedule, and implementation kickoff timeline. Evelyn will handle contract review and procurement process.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation after contract signature?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within one week of signed contract.

next_steps: Rep to send final contract to Evelyn
Evelyn to route through legal and procurement

touches.ai_summary: Executive sign-off meeting with David Adams and Lucas. David confirmed approval of the deal and expressed enthusiasm about improving their CRM efficiency. Discussed success metrics and expectations for Q2 rollout. David emphasized importance of smooth implementation.

questions_asked.question: What do we need to do on our end to ensure successful implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We'll need a dedicated point of contact from your team and access to your current CRM data for migration.

questions_asked.question: Are there any potential roadblocks we should plan for?
questions_asked.answer: Our IT team can be slow on access approvals, but Evelyn will manage that process.

next_steps: Evelyn to finalize contract with legal
Schedule implementation kickoff

questions_asked.question: Who will be our main point of contact during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: You'll have a dedicated implementation consultant plus ongoing access to our customer success team.
